{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nofuhtija tas Keh- 
nitsch Zedeḱijus/ un dabbuja to 
Praweetu Jeremiju pee ſewim 
tretchā ee-etjannā Weetā/ tas pee 
ta KUNGA Namma bija. Un 
tas Kehninsch fazzija us Jeremi- 
in: Es watzaſchu tevi kahdu 
Leetii/ ne aptlep preeſch man- 
nim neneeka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tazzija Jeremijus 
us Zedeḱiju: Kad es tew to stah- 
ſtitchu/ tad tu manni teefscham 
nokauti/ un kad es tew Padoh- 
mu dohſchu/ tad tomehr tu man- 
nis ne klaufift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad swebreja tas Keh- 
nitsch Zedeḱijus Jeremijum pa- 
fleppeni/ un fazzija: Lik teefcham 
ka tas KURGS dſihwo/ kas 
mums jcho Dwehfeli irr darrijs/ 
es ne nokaufchu tevi/ un ne no- 
dohſchu tevi ſcheem Wihreem 
Rohkā/ kas tawu Dwehfeli 
mette.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jeremijus us 
Zedeḱiju: Ta ſakka tas KUNGS/ 
tas Deews Zeboot/ tas Israēta 
Deews: Ja tu ar labbu Prahtu 
tseefi pre teem Leel-Kungeem ta 
Kehnina no Babeles/ tad tawa 
Dwehfele dſihwohs / un ſchis 
Pilsfahts ne taps ar Ugguni 
fadedſinahts/ un tad dſihwoſi tu/ 
un taws Nams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja tu ne tseefi pee 
teem Leel-Kungeem ta Kehnina 
no Babeles/ tad taps ſchis Pils-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch Je- 
jus fazzija us Jeremiju: Es 
ſtohs par teem Judeem/kas 
Kaldeēreem irr peekrittnſchi 
tee manni winno Rohkā ne de 
un tee mannis apinehd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jeremijus fazz 
Tee tevi ne nodohe/ klaufi 
ta KUNGA Balkinei/ ko es 
tewi runnaju/ tad tew labbi 
tees / un tawa Dwehfele 
wohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja tu leedsees 
eet/ tad irr ſchis tas Wahrd- 
tas KUNGS man irr pa 
dijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redsi/ tad wiﬀas 
was/ kas eekſch ta Kehnina 
Juhda Namma atleeſ/ tap- 
westas pee teem Leel-Kung 
ta Kehnina no Babeles/ un 
fazzibs: Tawi Eepreezfnata 
teivi ſkubbinaſcht/ un irr 
pahrwarrejſcht/ tawas Ka 
irr Dubnas grimmuſchas/
winni pascht irr atpaffat 
suschees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta taps wiﬀas ta 
Seewas/ un wiſſi tawt Be 
iſwesti pee teem Kaldeēreem/ 
tu vats ne iſſprukſi no wi 
Rohkahm/ bet tu tapſi zaui 
Rohku ta Kehnina no Bab 
ſgrahbts / un fadedſinaſt 
Bilsfahtu ar Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Zedeḱijus
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
